2026-03-30INFCFinancial Administration ActAppointment of Auditor of the Jacques-Cartier and Champlain Bridges Inc. Order appointing the Auditor General of Canada as the auditor of the Jacques-Cartier and Champlain Bridges Inc. for the fiscal year ending on March 31, 2027.N/A
subject: Appointment of Auditor of the Jacques-Cartier and Champlain Bridges Inc.
precis: Order appointing the Auditor General of Canada as the auditor of the Jacques-Cartier and Champlain Bridges Inc. for the fiscal year ending on March 31, 2027.
